text:
The contributions of1lma Nasir, Editor(contractual); Asma Khanam,
Assistant Editor (contractual); Aastha Sharma, Editorial Assistant
(contractual); Ariba Usman, Adiba Tasneem, Ritika Marothia, Mobbata
Ram and Kaiminlen Doungel, Proof Readers (contractual), Publication
Division are also appreciated. The NCERT gratefully acknowledges the
contributions of Pawan Kumar Barriar, In charge, DTP Cell; Mohan
Singh, Vipan Kumar Sharma, Kishore Singhal, Ajay Kumar Prajapati
and Upasana, DTP Operators (contractual), Publication Division,
NCERT for all their efforts in laying out this book.
